history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body shot from behind of a young person wearing a black t-shirt, light-colored knee-length shorts, a white baseball cap worn backward, and black flip-flops. They are standing on an asphalt road at night. The person's right arm is slightly bent and extended forward, with their hand blurred due to motion. Their left arm is down by their side. The background shows a dimly lit street with a sidewalk and some trees. A tall street light is visible on the left, casting a bright, soft glow that illuminates the scene. The road has white lane markings. The overall mood is casual and nocturnal, with a slightly blurry, candid feel. The color palette is dominated by dark blues and grays of the night sky, the muted greens of the foliage, and the warm tones of the artificial light on the asphalt and the person's clothing. The lighting is dramatic, with strong shadows cast by the street light. The style is realistic with a touch of motion blur.
